utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: 1) destination: specified as Lisbon, Portugal; 2) travel_dates: specified as 2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09; 3) transportation: includes flight details with costs; 4) accommodation: includes hotel name, type, location, price per night, total cost, and currency; 5) activities: includes three activities, each with name, type, cost, and currency; 6) additional_services: includes lists of restaurants with meal costs and total restaurant cost; 7) total_budget: detailed breakdown of flights, accommodation, activities, restaurants, total, and currency. All items are fully specified according to requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes Lisbon, Portugal as the destination, which has a rating of 7 in the ground-truth data.
